interventions.name: P4 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: interface-first design tasks that require naming each function's responsibility, inputs, and outputs before implementation

interventions.name: P4 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: call-and-return trace routines that follow values through bounded function interactions

interventions.name: P4 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: black-box versus white-box comparisons that separate interface reasoning from internal detail

interventions.name: P4 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired redesign tasks that reapply one decomposition pattern in a second program context
